description: Add a UI control in organization settings to enable or disable AI-powered features at the organization level. This toggle should update the existing `isAIEnabled` flag on the Organization model and provide appropriate access controls and user feedback.
functional_requirements: Create a settings card with a toggle switch on the organization general settings page to control AI feature availability
Restrict toggle access to organization owners and managers, showing a read-only view with explanatory text for other users
Implement server-side validation and authorization for organization updates, replacing existing single-purpose actions with a unified update function
Provide loading states, success/error toasts, and page refresh after updates to ensure UI consistency
Add internationalization support for all UI text related to the AI toggle feature
Maintain audit logging for all organization setting changes including AI toggle updates
